title: Redstone Dye
description: Uncraft redstone into red dye. Why did Mojang never add this?
body:
**Make redstone more useful again!**

Ever looked at redstone dust and thought…
why can’t I just use this as dye?
This mod lets you uncraft redstone into red dye, giving the classic dust a logical extra use. It stays true to vanilla gameplay while adding a small quality of life improvement that just makes sense.

No complicated systems.
No balance changes.
Just a simple crafting solution players have wanted for years.

Why did Mojang never add this? 🤔
Maybe the redstone engineers needed all the red for comparators.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✅ Optional Features Section**

❤️ Convert redstone → red dye

🎮 Fully vanilla balanced

⚡ Lightweight & simple

📦 Works great in modpack

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![uncraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deb074ed19e2a80290cafeb0757095082a3e007b.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
